##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_Mn^3+^_2_Si_4_O_11_(OH)_4_·2H_2_O

##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Brown prismatic crystals in radiating groups, with a globular gyrolite-like mineral, on and in hydroxyapophyllite-(K) with minor inesite.

##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130787
